name: channel-trusted-context-dirs
title: Channel: trusted context dirs for symlinked Trellis workspaces
description: Fix #414: jailedRealpath rejects context files reached via legitimate .trellis symlinks; add channel.trusted_context_dirs config allowlist + auto-trust realpath targets of top-level .trellis/tasks and .trellis/workspace symlinks; apply consistently to context-loader, agent-loader, and the OMP extension template
creator: taosu
